header.description: Starts the workflow when Cisco Webex events occur.

resolveData.description: By default the response only contain a reference to the data the user inputed. If this option gets activated, it will resolve the data automatically.

hasFiles.description: Whether to limit to messages which contain file content attachments

isLocked.description: Whether to limit to rooms that are locked

isModerator.description: Whether to limit to moderators of a room

mentionedPeople.description: Limit to messages which contain these mentioned people, by person ID; accepts me as a shorthand for your own person ID; separate multiple values with commas

messageId.description: Limit to a particular message, by ID

personEmail.description: Limit to a particular person, by email

personId.description: Limit to a particular person, by ID

roomId.description: Limit to a particular room, by ID

roomType.description: Limit to a particular room type

type.description: Limit to a particular room type
